title: DurabilityRarity
description: DurabilityRarity introduces a configurable rarity system that adds randomized durability tiers to every crafted or discovered tool, weapon, or armor.
body:
# 🛡️ DurabilityRarity – Mod
Not all gear is created equal.

DurabilityRarity introduces a configurable rarity system that adds randomized durability tiers to every crafted or discovered tool, weapon, or armor.
Each tier affects the item’s durability - from brittle to nearly unbreakable - adding variety, challenge, and reward to the way you gear up.
![DurabilityRarity-Banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e5e4c229225d3985ac277c888dd2133ac19de75.gif)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B43K17gYQRg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This lightweight and modular mod is perfect for survival, RPG, or exploration-focused modpacks and integrates seamlessly into both vanilla and modded gameplay.

## 🎲 Rarity Tiers & Chances

![Rarity Tiers, Multiplier & Chances](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8237a88a4be0790825f61805d0d952a18eaab62f.png)

Each time you craft an item, open a loot chest, or claim a reward from a structure, the item receives a random rarity, directly affecting its durability. But only if you put it into your Inventory.

## ⚙️ Features
- ✅ Automatically applies to vanilla and modded gear
- ✅ Works with crafted gear, loot chests, dungeon rewards, and more
- ✅ Fully configurable via durabilityrarity-config.toml
- ✅ Compatible with Forge-based modpacks
- ✅ NEW: Legendary items now gain bonus attack speed and mining speed (configurable)
- ✅ NEW FOR 1.21.x - VERSIONS: Visual Update to tell apart rarities easier and faster
- ✅ Supports most major loot, combat, and worldgen mods

Whether you're delving into forgotten ruins or forging your next blade, each item now carries a sense of risk and value.

## 🔧 Configuration
You can easily adjust rarity chances and durability multipliers in the config file.
Fine-tune balance for your pack, or create custom rules for specific items and mods.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
